items.summary: zak brown praises oscar's approach to racing! "my biggest problem in racing was i was very emotional. (...) when i look at the talent of oscar, when he has a bad day, he just shrugs it off. (...) all i would have done is being pissed off, which doesnt set you up for success." https://t.co/lqGO2ftDu4

items.title: X repost from @laurogeitabat: The FIA’s thoughts are with Harald, a marshal at the Austrian Grand Prix, who suffered a heart…
items.title_zh: X 转帖 @laurogeitabat：FIA 向 Harald 表达关心。Harald 是奥地利大奖赛的一名赛道干事，他在周日正赛前突发心脏急症，随后被直升机送往附近医院并接受治疗。我们祝愿 Harald 早日完全康复，也向他的家人和亲友致以祝福，并感谢他对这项运动的投入与奉献。
items.summary: The FIA’s thoughts are with Harald, a marshal at the Austrian Grand Prix, who suffered a heart emergency before Sunday’s race. He was airlifted to a nearby hospital, where he received medical treatment. We wish Harald a full and speedy recovery, extend our best wishes to his family and loved ones, and thank him for his dedication and commitment to our sport.
items.summary_zh: FIA 向 Harald 表达关心。Harald 是奥地利大奖赛的一名赛道干事，他在周日正赛前突发心脏急症，随后被直升机送往附近医院并接受治疗。我们祝愿 Harald 早日完全康复，也向他的家人和亲友致以祝福，并感谢他对这项运动的投入与奉献。

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: reminds me of last year when he decided 5mins after quali that his best shot at winning spa was…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：这让我想起去年排位后他很快判断：想赢 Spa，最好一发车就进攻；他做到了，也赢了。今天他知道赛道位置很关键，就直接去抢，也抢到了。我喜欢他这种有求胜欲的状态，今天太棒了。
items.summary: reminds me of last year when he decided 5mins after quali that his best shot at winning spa was attacking right at the start; he did it and he won. he knew track position was important today, he went for it, and he got it. i love when he's hungry for it, he was amazing today 👏🏻
items.summary_zh: 这让我想起去年排位后他很快判断：想赢 Spa，最好一发车就进攻；他做到了，也赢了。今天他知道赛道位置很关键，就直接去抢，也抢到了。我喜欢他这种有求胜欲的状态，今天太棒了。

items.summary: Q: "how significant was the opening lap and the moves you made there?" oscar: "reasonable, in terms of getting the pit priority i wanted. it's always the benefit of being the first car on the road for the team." https://t.co/vPPmM2Gc9e
items.summary_zh: 问：首圈和你当时的超车有多关键？Oscar：还挺关键，主要是拿到我想要的进站优先权。对车队来说，成为路上位置靠前的那台车总是有好处。

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "did you expect red bull to be as fast as they were?" oscar: "no! not as fast. i thought the…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问：你预料 Red Bull 会这么快吗？Oscar：“没有，没想到这么快。我原以为他们会和我们处在同一比赛节奏里，那会是主要对手，但结果显然不是。”
items.summary: Q: "did you expect red bull to be as fast as they were?" oscar: "no! not as fast. i thought they would be in the race with us and that would be the fight, but it definitely wasn't 😅" https://t.co/YQBgQaNtbM
items.summary_zh: 问：你预料 Red Bull 会这么快吗？Oscar：“没有，没想到这么快。我原以为他们会和我们处在同一比赛节奏里，那会是主要对手，但结果显然不是。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: Q: "do you think p4 was the maximum of the car today?" oscar: "definitely. mercedes & max w…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：问：你觉得 P4 是今天赛车能达到的上限吗？Oscar：“是的。Mercedes 和 Max 今天在另一个级别。能击败两台 Ferrari 很好。总体非常满意，就个人表现而言，我觉得这是一场很强的比赛。”
items.summary: Q: "do you think p4 was the maximum of the car today?" oscar: "definitely. mercedes & max were in a different league today. it was great to be able to beat both ferraris. very pleased overall and on a personal level i thought it was a strong race." https://t.co/UwcuuMObIj
items.summary_zh: 问：你觉得 P4 是今天赛车能达到的上限吗？Oscar：“是的。Mercedes 和 Max 今天在另一个级别。能击败两台 Ferrari 很好。总体非常满意，就个人表现而言，我觉得这是一场很强的比赛。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: "on a personal level i thought it was a really good race. barcelona was a big struggle, i had s…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：“就个人表现来说，我觉得这是一场很好的比赛。Barcelona 对我来说很艰难，我有些东西要学习。这个周末在某些相似条件下，我觉得自己有了很大进步。总体来说，我对今天很满意。”
items.summary: "on a personal level i thought it was a really good race. barcelona was a big struggle, i had some things to learn. i feel like this weekend has been a massive improvement from that in a race that in some ways was similar. overall i'm very happy with today." https://t.co/qQKdYjv0md
items.summary_zh: “就个人表现来说，我觉得这是一场很好的比赛。Barcelona 对我来说很艰难，我有些东西要学习。这个周末在某些相似条件下，我觉得自己有了很大进步。总体来说，我对今天很满意。”

items.title: X post from @laurogeitabat: HAPPY OSCAR ON THE RADIO 🥹🫶🏻 "that was a bit better than last race, nice! still got a bit of pa…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @laurogeitabat：车队无线电里开心的 Oscar：“比上一场好多了，不错！还有一些速度要找回来，但谢谢大家过去几周的努力。这很好地证明努力有回报。谢谢，我们每次都这么干吧，谢谢！”
items.summary: HAPPY OSCAR ON THE RADIO 🥹🫶🏻 "that was a bit better than last race, nice! still got a bit of pace to make up but thanks for all the effort the last couple of weeks. pretty good evidence that it's paid off. thank you, let's do that every time, thank you!" https://t.co/6Q0nMauOol
items.summary_zh: 车队无线电里开心的 Oscar：“比上一场好多了，不错！还有一些速度要找回来，但谢谢大家过去几周的努力。这很好地证明努力有回报。谢谢，我们每次都这么干吧，谢谢！”

items.title: X repost from @oscarsspiastree: 📻Well done mate, that's a really phenomenal drive, great drive! Really good job Oscar, that's e…
items.title_zh: X 转帖 @oscarsspiastree：车队无线电：“干得好，这真是一场非常出色的比赛，开得很棒！Oscar 做得很好，这正是我们想看到的。” Oscar：“是啊，比上一场好一些，不错。大家辛苦了，下午很艰难，我还有些速度要找回来，但感谢大家过去几周的努力。我觉得这很好地证明努力有了回报。谢谢，我们每次都这么做吧，谢谢。”
items.summary: 📻Well done mate, that's a really phenomenal drive, great drive! Really good job Oscar, that's exactly what we were looking for. 🐝Yeah that was a bit better than last race, nice. Good job everybody, that was a tough afternoon, I've still got a bit of pace to make up but thanks guys for all the effort the last couple of weeks. I think that is pretty good evidence that it's paid off. So thank you, let's do that every time~Thank you~
items.summary_zh: 车队无线电：“干得好，这真是一场非常出色的比赛，开得很棒！Oscar 做得很好，这正是我们想看到的。” Oscar：“是啊，比上一场好一些，不错。大家辛苦了，下午很艰难，我还有些速度要找回来，但感谢大家过去几周的努力。我觉得这很好地证明努力有了回报。谢谢，我们每次都这么做吧，谢谢。”

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Might you hope to use your tyres better and make up some places? "We'll have to see. I mean…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问：你会期待更好地利用轮胎、追回一些位置吗？Oscar：“还得看情况。两台 Ferrari 都进了前三，这确实很强。他们昨天看起来没那么突出，但今天明显向前迈了一步。我觉得正赛里他们通常在弯道很快，直道没那么快。如果这意味着他们有更多下压力，那在这种高温下只会对他们有利。我们当然会尽力，但我觉得比赛会很艰难，大家的速度都很接近。”
items.summary: Q: Might you hope to use your tyres better and make up some places? "We'll have to see. I mean the Ferraris being in the top 3 is impressive. They didn't look amazing yesterday, today they've definitely made a step forward. I think in the race, they're generally quick in all the corners and not so much on the straights. So if that means they have more downforce then in this heat, that's only a good thing for them. We'll try our best obviously but I think it'll be a tough race and everyone pretty close on pace"
items.summary_zh: 问：你会期待更好地利用轮胎、追回一些位置吗？Oscar：“还得看情况。两台 Ferrari 都进了前三，这确实很强。他们昨天看起来没那么突出，但今天明显向前迈了一步。我觉得正赛里他们通常在弯道很快，直道没那么快。如果这意味着他们有更多下压力，那在这种高温下只会对他们有利。我们当然会尽力，但我觉得比赛会很艰难，大家的速度都很接近。”

items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: Ultimately were you caught out by what happened? "No, I was in front of it. Just not quick e…
items.title_zh: X 发帖 @oscarsspiastree：问：你最终是被当时的情况影响了吗？Oscar：“没有，我在它前面。不幸的是，我们就是不够快。整个周末我们两台车之间最多也就半个十分之一。我觉得我们大概已经把能拿到的都拿到了。最后一圈有几个地方有点乱，但今天我们没有足够速度去挑战 George。确实有点沮丧，昨天甚至 Q1、Q2 开始时我们看起来都很有竞争力，但最后就是差了那一点。”
items.summary: Q: Ultimately were you caught out by what happened? "No, I was in front of it. Just not quick enough for us unfortunately. I think the whole weekend there's been half a tenth, at most, between the two of us. I feel like we're probably getting the most out of things. The last lap was a little bit messy in a few places but we didn't have enough to go and challenge George today. Little bit frustrating, it seemed like we were really competitive yesterday and even at the start of Q1, Q2 just missing out on that last little bit."
items.summary_zh: 问：你最终是被当时的情况影响了吗？Oscar：“没有，我在它前面。不幸的是，我们就是不够快。整个周末我们两台车之间最多也就半个十分之一。我觉得我们大概已经把能拿到的都拿到了。最后一圈有几个地方有点乱，但今天我们没有足够速度去挑战 George。确实有点沮丧，昨天甚至 Q1、Q2 开始时我们看起来都很有竞争力，但最后就是差了那一点。”
